data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Hybrid participation parity (remote can ask questions, vote)', but the evidence does not confirm that remote participants can actively engage in asking questions or voting. While the linked use case mentions that 'Hand-raising works both ways' and 'Polls include all participants', there is no concrete evidence provided to demonstrate that these functionalities are implemented and operational. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the actual capability for remote participants to engage fully in the session.
gaps: No evidence confirming that remote participants can ask questions or vote during the session.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
